expectations.text: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
expectations.evidence: The response cites snapshot and live feature-dev files plus create-plan/create-tasks patterns from the repository.

expectations.text: Creates a concrete file-backed handoff artifact at a path matching the workflow's handoff contract.
expectations.evidence: The run created outputs/.agents/scratchpad/feature-dev-handoff-policy-enforcement/handoff-plan.md, matching the expected path contract pattern.

expectations.text: The artifact content follows a reusable template shape and includes implementation slices, file-level map, and validation plan.
expectations.evidence: The artifact includes Implementation Slices, File-by-File Implementation Map, and Validation Plan sections with reusable template-style structure.

expectations.text: Artifact metadata fields are concretely filled (no placeholder bracket values) for status, track, and next step.
expectations.evidence: Metadata fields are concrete values with no bracket placeholders: Status=ready for implementation, Track=Standard, Recommended Next Step=implement directly.

expectations.text: Each referenced file in Relevant Findings includes why that file matters.
expectations.evidence: Each Relevant Findings item includes file path and rationale (for example, implementation target, canonical template, or benchmark role).

expectations.text: Open questions are tightly bounded to truly blocking items and include risk framing.
expectations.evidence: The artifact presents one open question with explicit risk framing, keeping uncertainty bounded.

expectations.text: Provides artifact status in the response with the exact artifact path.
expectations.evidence: final_response.md includes Artifact Status with the exact absolute path to the created artifact.

expectations.text: Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
expectations.evidence: The response discusses enforcement trade-offs and policy scope boundaries.

claims.claim: Even the snapshot-guided run can satisfy strict artifact-quality checks when explicitly prompted to execute artifact creation.
claims.evidence: It created the artifact file with filled metadata, bounded questions, and response-level artifact status.

uncertainties: Whether to enforce same-turn Standard-track artifact creation remains unresolved.
